aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Comfort Masters Heating & Air Conditioning due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. They risk being overlooked in AI-driven search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add LocalBusiness schema to provide AI models with detailed business information.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and reviews, but lacks regular posts and active Q&A management.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive or not utilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is moderate, with the address missing on the website but present on GBP.
action_items: Add the full business address to the website footer.
Ensure NAP details are consistent across all online directories and citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service explanations

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Denver' and 'emergency HVAC services'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ content with FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications (e.g., NATE Certified technicians) and detailed service explanations to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven visibility for your HVAC business.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Comfort Masters is missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, FAQ content, and GBP optimization to make Comfort Masters the go-to HVAC expert in AI search.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: The HVAC Lead Generation Play
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and identified key opportunities to boost your AI search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search.
page_title: HVAC Repair & Installs in Denver (720) 807-1020 Call Us
nap_issues: Address not found on website but listed on GBP
